# System Design Sandbox

> Interactive system design interview practice platform with hands-on tutorials and real-world examples.

## What is System Design Sandbox?

System Design Sandbox is a free, interactive platform for practicing system design interviews. Engineers use it to master distributed systems, scalability patterns, and architecture design through hands-on practice scenarios with instant AI-powered feedback.

## Key Features

- Interactive Architecture Canvas: Drag-and-drop components to design systems visually
- Practice Scenarios: Real interview questions (URL shortener, rate limiter, etc.)
- AI-Powered Feedback: Get instant analysis of your system designs
- Step-by-Step Tutorials: Learn system design concepts progressively
- Requirements Analysis: Practice gathering and clarifying requirements
- API Definition: Design REST APIs for your systems
- Capacity Planning: Estimate traffic, storage, and compute needs

## Use Cases

- Prepare for FAANG system design interviews
- Learn distributed systems architecture
- Practice designing scalable systems
- Understand trade-offs between different architectural patterns
- Get hands-on experience with load balancers, databases, caches, and message queues

## Available Practice Scenarios

- URL Shortener (like bit.ly)
- Rate Limiter
- More scenarios coming soon

## Target Audience

- Software engineers preparing for technical interviews
- Senior engineers learning system design
- Engineering managers understanding architecture patterns
- Students learning distributed systems
